---
title: "West Coast National Marine Sanctuaries Marine Heatwave Tracker"
format: html
subtitle: "Greater Farallones National Marine Sanctuary"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: regions
    contents: sanct_menu.yml
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: false
    filter-ui: false
    image-height: 180px
    grid-item-border: false
    grid-item-align: center
    grid-columns: 8
    fields: [title,image]

---
